## What's changed

- Rebranded the app as **UsageDeck**, with a new name, icon, repository, and developer-facing project structure.
- Preserved existing installations, settings, saved credentials, shortcuts, and automatic updates across the rename.
- Corrected Codex subscription labels so eligible accounts show **Pro 5x** or **Pro 20x** instead of **Pro Lite**.

Existing installations can update normally in place; no migration or reinstall is required.

**Full changelog:** [v0.2.1...v0.3.0](https://github.com/CallMeLewis/UsageDeck/compare/v0.2.1...v0.3.0)
